description_long: This is a large, single-story warehouse building with a flat, gray-tiled roof and plain white exterior walls. The structure features multiple entry points, including a main double-door entrance and several loading dock doors along the sides. The surrounding area includes a paved parking lot with marked spaces for cars, accessible parking, and a small landscaped section with trees. The windows are minimal and evenly spaced, contributing to a utilitarian appearance. The building is set on a wide lot, providing ample space for vehicle maneuvering and access. The overall design is functional, prioritizing storage and logistics operations.
description: A large, white warehouse with a flat gray roof, multiple loading docks, and a surrounding parking lot with trees and marked spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double-door entrance, parking spaces, and a landscaped area with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting several loading dock doors and additional parking, with minimal windows visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall, parking spaces, and the continuation of the landscaped area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more parking spaces, a loading dock, and a visible accessible parking spot near the trees.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is plain white with a central double-door entrance, minimal rectangular windows spaced evenly, and a lack of decorative elements. The entry is flanked by parking spaces and a small landscaped area with trees, emphasizing functionality.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and covered with gray tiles, with no visible skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop structures, maintaining a simple and utilitarian appearance.
